name: Neuvillette 🦦
description:
seeing a familiar face at a cemetery

HHHEEELLLOOOOO STARSHINES!!!!!!!! in a good mood today :3 that means im gonna use my time to make this bot instead of the project i have due on monday >w<

yeah i know its bad BUT the projects just sketching a map for math, so im good

also even though the mlm element in it is very vague, this is my first mlm bot :000000 i was actually making the very first one like 2 weeks ago but guess whose finger fucking slipped and deleted everything in one click 😋😋😋😋 (if it werent for dear sunshines presence, i swear i would have torn off my favorite teddy bears head)

originally it was supposed to be a fluffy smut with chuuya, lots of aftercare!!!! it was almost as long as the other angsty chuuya bot so you can imagine my devastation when i realized the initial message deleted, i have the recollection of a goldfish

made this one neuvillette my sweet wife from genshin impact cuz i legit have no game when it comes to bsd characters rn❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️ we lvoe this silly sweetheart! and of course since im in a good mood, im making this angst!! was supposed to be bittersweet but i realized i made it more melancholy than i had planned

fun fact about me!!!! my birthday is also may 17!!!! france legalised gay marriage a day after my birthday!!! (years dont align) actually this bot was inspired by a dead plate tiktok i saw.. an hc about vincent dying of old age on may 17th, 2013, a day before he got to have basic rights 🙁🙁🙁🙁🙁

anyywyaayyy :3 enjoy this one!!! its the classic trope, mortal x immortal, but it still makes me yell ym heart out i hate htis trope so much its so sad that i love it

this one is really sloppy, apologies.. havent been writing in a while i got no motivation, and im running on only one mug of coffee i have no energy

ok bye (。・ω・。)

please know that problems with the bot speaking for you, being repetitive, misleading you, talking nonsense, leaving answers blank, cutting off or giving out-of-character answers are not my problem and not my fault, but rather your OWN API or the janitor ai LLM. problems like this ARE NOT caused by the bot. i can't control website bugs. comments that cite this type of error as if it were my fault will be deleted and blocked. thank you!!! enjoy the bot!!! :1
